description: HTML Forms child-webview (label `compose-form-*`, P1 Task 7). Loopback HTTP fetch ONLY: the webview talks to tuxlink exclusively via the lazy forms::http_server bound at 127.0.0.1:<ephemeral-port>. NO Tauri IPC, NO fs, NO shell, NO window control. Per design §5.6 + §10: even a malicious custom-form HTML file scoped here cannot reach tuxlink internals (compose state, mailbox, credentials, GPS); its blast radius is its own webview, which gets discarded on close.
